nasb.text: These are the people of the province who came up from the captivity of the exiles whom Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon had carried away, and who returned to Jerusalem and Judah, each to his city,

esv.text: These were the people of the province who came up out of the captivity of those exiles whom Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon had carried into exile. They returned to Jerusalem and Judah, each to his town.

cnv.text: 以下這些猶大省的人，從前巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒擄走他們，現在他們從被擄之地歸回耶路撒冷和猶大，各人回到自己的城鎮。

ccb.text: 巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒从前把犹大省的人掳到巴比伦，这些人的子孙回到耶路撒冷和犹大后，各回本城。
